_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Skill in configuring and utilizing software-based computer protection tools (e.g., software firewalls, anti-virus software, anti-spyware).
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of data platform security controls, including network isolation, encryption at rest and in transit, identity and access management, and audit logging.
comments: DCWF ksa superset of WIDAI DA domain. DA-K-012 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: SP-S-008 (SP, cosine: 0.554), SP-T-001 (SP, cosine: 0.551).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.2/10 (raw 0.515). No substantive shared vocabulary — relationship is purely semantic. DCWF-only terms [anti, based, computer, configuring, firewalls, protection] vs WIDAI-only terms [access, audit, controls, data, encryption, identity] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.865 (P=0.857, R=0.873). Balanced P/R — the 15-word DCWF element and 22-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.9%). "Skill in configuring and utilizing software-based computer protection tools (e.g" and "Knowledge of data platform security controls, including network isolation, encry" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.558 ≈ STS 0.515 (gap 0.043). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [none] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 5.9%. Zero substantive shared tokens. The entire relationship is semantic — no lexical trace. DCWF terms: [anti, based, computer, configuring, firewalls, protection]. WIDAI terms: [access, audit, controls, data, encryption, identity].

signals.detail: STS 0.515 barely clears classification threshold for Superset of. This match is fragile and may indicate insufficient KSA coverage for this competency area.
